title: Update actions/stale action to v10.3.0

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>actions/stale (actions/stale)</summary>

### [`v10.3.0`](https://redirect.github.com/actions/stale/releases/tag/v10.3.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/actions/stale/compare/v10.2.0...v10.3.0)

#### What's Changed

##### Bug Fix

- Enhancement: ignore stale labeling events by [@​shamoon](https://redirect.github.com/shamoon) in [#​1311](https://redirect.github.com/actions/stale/pull/1311)

##### Dependency Updates

- Upgrade dependencies ([@​actions/core](https://redirect.github.com/actions/core), [@​octokit/plugin-retry](https://redirect.github.com/octokit/plugin-retry), [@​typescript-eslint](https://redirect.github.com/typescript-eslint)) by [@​Copilot](https://redirect.github.com/Copilot) in [#​1335](https://redirect.github.com/actions/stale/pull/1335)

#### New Contributors

- [@​shamoon](https://redirect.github.com/shamoon) made their first contribution in [#​1311](https://redirect.github.com/actions/stale/pull/1311)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/actions/stale/compare/v10...v10.3.0>

</details>
